TITLE: Resume/CV File Not Found
ISSUE_DESCRIPTION: Links reference /Nazir-Resume.pdf that doesn't exist
CURRENT_BEHAVIOR: Download links fail silently - no error shown
EXPECTED_BEHAVIOR: File exists and downloads successfully
ROOT_CAUSE: File not added to public folder
SOLUTION: Add Nazir-Resume.pdf to public folder and verify before build

TITLE: EmailJS Public Key Exposed
ISSUE_DESCRIPTION: Private API key hardcoded in frontend source code
CURRENT_BEHAVIOR: API key visible in browser console and source code
EXPECTED_BEHAVIOR: API key stored in environment variables
SOLUTION: Move to .env file as VITE_EMAILJS_PUBLIC_KEY and load via import.meta.env

TITLE: Unused Suspense Import
ISSUE_DESCRIPTION: Suspense imported from React but never used
CURRENT_BEHAVIOR: Unused import increases bundle size
EXPECTED_BEHAVIOR: Clean imports only
SOLUTION: Remove unused import from line 1

TITLE: Unused Icon Imports
ISSUE_DESCRIPTION: Database Code Server icons imported but never used
CURRENT_BEHAVIOR: Unused icons in bundle
EXPECTED_BEHAVIOR: Clean imports
SOLUTION: Remove Database Code Server from lucide-react import

TITLE: No Error Boundary
ISSUE_DESCRIPTION: Single component error crashes entire application
CURRENT_BEHAVIOR: App crashes on component error
EXPECTED_BEHAVIOR: Graceful error handling with error page
SOLUTION: Implement React Error Boundary component

TITLE: Unnecessary Bootstrap CSS
ISSUE_DESCRIPTION: Bootstrap 5.3 loaded but only Tailwind used
CURRENT_BEHAVIOR: 50KB wasted bandwidth on unused CSS
EXPECTED_BEHAVIOR: Remove unnecessary dependency
SOLUTION: Remove Bootstrap CDN link from index.html

TITLE: Unused Environment Variable
ISSUE_DESCRIPTION: GEMINI_API_KEY defined but never used in application
CURRENT_BEHAVIOR: Misleading configuration that's never implemented
EXPECTED_BEHAVIOR: Either use variable or remove from config
SOLUTION: Either implement Gemini API usage or remove from vite.config.js

TITLE: No Input Validation
ISSUE_DESCRIPTION: Form submits empty or invalid data
CURRENT_BEHAVIOR: Empty submissions allowed spam - soft UX failure
EXPECTED_BEHAVIOR: Validate name email message before submission
SOLUTION: Add form validation before handleSubmit

TITLE: Hero Typing Animation Memory Leak
ISSUE_DESCRIPTION: useEffect has missing dependency causing re-renders
CURRENT_BEHAVIOR: Browser slows down - potential crash on low-end devices
EXPECTED_BEHAVIOR: Proper dependency array prevents re-renders
SOLUTION: Add all dependencies: text isDeleting loopNum typingSpeed words

TITLE: No Loading State for 3D Canvas
ISSUE_DESCRIPTION: Canvas3D component takes time to render causing blank screen
CURRENT_BEHAVIOR: White blank screen while 3D canvas loads
EXPECTED_BEHAVIOR: Show skeleton loader while loading
SOLUTION: Add loading indicator while Canvas3D renders

TITLE: Missing Resume File Fallback
ISSUE_DESCRIPTION: No fallback if resume file doesn't exist
CURRENT_BEHAVIOR: Silent failure - buttons don't work
EXPECTED_BEHAVIOR: Show error message or disable buttons
ROOT_CAUSE: No error handling for missing file
SOLUTION: Check file existence at build time - show fallback UI

TITLE: Contact Form Network Errors
ISSUE_DESCRIPTION: No retry mechanism for failed email submissions
CURRENT_BEHAVIOR: User can't retry - must manually refresh
EXPECTED_BEHAVIOR: Auto-retry with exponential backoff
SOLUTION: Add retry button and exponential backoff logic

TITLE: Dark Mode Not Persisting
ISSUE_DESCRIPTION: Theme resets to dark mode on every page reload
CURRENT_BEHAVIOR: Theme choice lost on refresh - bad UX
EXPECTED_BEHAVIOR: Theme persists across sessions
SOLUTION: Save theme to localStorage and load on mount

TITLE: Missing ARIA Labels
ISSUE_DESCRIPTION: Buttons and icon-only elements lack aria-labels and roles
CURRENT_BEHAVIOR: Screen readers can't understand interactive elements
EXPECTED_BEHAVIOR: All interactive elements have proper ARIA labels
SOLUTION: Add aria-label="" role="button" to all buttons

TITLE: Missing Image Alt Text
ISSUE_DESCRIPTION: Images don't have proper alt text for accessibility
CURRENT_BEHAVIOR: Screen reader users get no image context
EXPECTED_BEHAVIOR: All images have descriptive alt text
SOLUTION: Add meaningful alt text to img tags

TITLE: No Image Optimization
ISSUE_DESCRIPTION: Using external picsum.photos + no lazy loading
CURRENT_BEHAVIOR: External service dependency + slow load times
EXPECTED_BEHAVIOR: Local optimized images with WebP format
SOLUTION: Replace with local images add lazy loading and WebP

TITLE: Missing SEO Meta Tags
ISSUE_DESCRIPTION: No OG tags description keywords for social sharing
CURRENT_BEHAVIOR: Poor SEO score - no rich preview on social sharing
EXPECTED_BEHAVIOR: Complete OG meta tags and descriptions
SOLUTION: Add meta tags for OG description keywords

TITLE: No Loading Skeletons
ISSUE_DESCRIPTION: Cards load abruptly without placeholder
CURRENT_BEHAVIOR: Jarring layout shift as content loads
EXPECTED_BEHAVIOR: Smooth skeleton animation while loading
SOLUTION: Add skeleton components for cards

TITLE: Bootstrap + Tailwind Mix
ISSUE_DESCRIPTION: Using Bootstrap grid (col-lg-6) alongside Tailwind classes
CURRENT_BEHAVIOR: Inconsistent styling - confusion for maintainers
EXPECTED_BEHAVIOR: Pure Tailwind CSS throughout
SOLUTION: Convert all Bootstrap classes to Tailwind equivalents

TITLE: No Analytics Tracking
ISSUE_DESCRIPTION: No Google Analytics or user event tracking implemented
CURRENT_BEHAVIOR: No data on user behavior and performance
EXPECTED_BEHAVIOR: Track page views and user interactions
SOLUTION: Add Google Analytics 4 with event tracking

TITLE: No Service Worker
ISSUE_DESCRIPTION: No offline support or asset caching
CURRENT_BEHAVIOR: App doesn't work offline
EXPECTED_BEHAVIOR: Service worker caches assets for offline
SOLUTION: Create service worker for offline support

TITLE: No Toast Notifications
ISSUE_DESCRIPTION: Contact form success/error shown in alert box
CURRENT_BEHAVIOR: Poor UX with browser alert
EXPECTED_BEHAVIOR: Smooth toast notifications appear and dismiss
SOLUTION: Add toast library (react-hot-toast or similar)

TITLE: No Smooth Scroll Behavior
ISSUE_DESCRIPTION: When clicking nav links jumps instantly to section
CURRENT_BEHAVIOR: Jarring navigation experience
EXPECTED_BEHAVIOR: Smooth scroll animation to sections
SOLUTION: Add scroll-behavior: smooth to html CSS
